interpretation.why_not_complete: Plain Isaac Sim Python can import isaaclab but does not enable the isaacsim.core extension namespace. Official whole_body_tracking deep config modules depend on isaacsim.core and therefore remain gated by a live Kit/SimulationApp extension-manager context, which is currently blocked by inotify limits.
